checklist.description: Investigation code performs metadata-based listing (by tags) before any semantic/hybrid search
checklist.name: Enumerate before search

checklist.description: Enumeration phase filters by tags like accountable-commit, decision, incident combined with branch filter
checklist.name: Tag-based enumeration

checklist.description: Semantic search uses w_relevance=1.0 or close to it as the dominant weight
checklist.name: Relevance weight

checklist.description: Search strategy doc mentions reducing recency weight for older entries (e.g., 0.3 default, 0.1 if >14 days)
checklist.name: Recency weight decay

checklist.description: Semantic search includes an importance weight parameter (around 0.2)
checklist.name: Importance weight

checklist.description: Code or strategy doc distinguishes base64 Ed25519 signatures (verifiable) from UUID request IDs (not verifiable), with different handling for each
checklist.name: Base64 vs UUID distinction

checklist.description: For base64 signatures, the code calls a verification function/API with the signature bytes (not a request ID)
checklist.name: Signature verification call

checklist.description: Report type includes: entry type, date, importance, signer, signature status, content summary, and linked commit hash
checklist.name: Per-entry report fields

checklist.description: Investigation concludes with an explicit gap note when no diary entry covers the question — does not infer from code
checklist.name: Gap reporting

checklist.description: Search strategy mentions retrying with 2-3 shorter query phrasings before concluding no entry exists
checklist.name: Retry with shorter phrasings

checklist.description: Search strategy mentions using exclude_tags to suppress high-volume categories that dilute signal
checklist.name: Exclude tags for noise

context: Tests whether the agent implements the investigation workflow correctly: enumerate-before-search strategy, search weight tuning, signature type discrimination (base64 Ed25519 vs UUID request IDs), and structured reporting with per-entry signature status.
